--- Round 1 ---
<think>The question asks for the number of companies where "流动资产合计" (Total Current Assets) is above 6,000,000,000.

I am processing DOC2 (《2024年一季度报告》for 航天智造科技股份有限公司).

Looking at the anchor summaries, DOC2_A10 mentions "合并资产负债表流动资产部分" and specifically states: "流动资产合计6,225,285,084.55元". This is above 6,000,000,000.

I need to open DOC2_A10 to get the exact verbatim text for the evidence.

Let me start by opening DOC2_A10.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC2_A10","expected_evidence":"流动资产合计的具体数值，用于判断是否超过6,000,000,000"}</search>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>I have opened DOC2_A10 and found the exact evidence. The document shows:

"流动资产合计|6,225,285,084.55|6,952,868,939.94"

This means the company 航天智造科技股份有限公司 has Total Current Assets (流动资产合计) of 6,225,285,084.55 yuan at the end of the period, which is above 6,000,000,000.

This is the evidence I need from DOC2. The question asks for the count of companies where 流动资产合计 is above 6,000,000,000. From this document, I can confirm that 航天智造科技股份有限公司 qualifies.

I have collected the relevant evidence from DOC2. I should now stop and provide the verbatim evidence.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"collected all needed evidence from DOC2"}</search>
<answer>"流动资产合计|6,225,285,084.55|6,952,868,939.94"</answer>
